name: healthcare_communications_outage_forces_kestrel_lib_eq
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare communications outage forces kestrel lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Amina Hughes
agents.identity: I am Amina Hughes, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Mateo Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Mateo Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Amina Hughes must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Amina Hughes do?
